name: research
description: Evidence-first AI research workflows for papers, official guidance, benchmarks, and workflow updates.

interface.shortDescription: AI research with source tiers, Exa-first retrieval, and verification gates.
interface.longDescription: Local research workflows for investigating AI papers, official model and tooling guidance, benchmarks, implementations, and community signals. The plugin emphasizes source-tiering, original-source verification, contradiction checks, and converting evidence into actionable workflow recommendations.
defaultPrompt: Research recent AI agent workflow evidence.
Compare official AI coding agent guidance.
Turn AI research findings into workflow rules.
